Boosts Immunity

Formulated to strengthen your child's natural defense mechanism against environmental stressors.

Delicious Fruit Flavor

Product Overview

Yummunity is a pediatric-focused Ayurvedic syrup crafted with ancient wisdom and modern precision. Specifically designed to protect children from seasonal infections, it builds a resilient immune system from within.

We understand that giving medicine to children can be a challenge. That's why Yummunity features a natural, kid-approved flavor profile without the use of harsh synthetic chemicals or excessive sugar. It's the perfect daily companion for school-going children.

  • Protects against cold, cough, and flu
  • Improves appetite and digestive health
  • Enhances cognitive growth and physical vitality

Key Ingredients

  • 01
    Amla (Indian Gooseberry)Richest source of natural Vitamin C and antioxidants.
  • 02
    AshwagandhaHelps in stress management and improves physical strength.
  • 03
    Giloy (Guduchi)Known as 'Amrita' for its powerful immune-modulating properties.

How to Use

1

Give 5-10ml

Standard serving size
2

Twice daily

Regular consistency is key
3

After meals

For optimal absorption
4

Shake well before use

To mix herbal extracts

100% Safe for Kids

Pediatrician recommended formulations.

No Side Effects

Made with pure botanical extracts.

AYUSH Licensed

Certified Ayurvedic medicine.

Frequently Asked Questions

What is the recommended age for Yummunity?
Yummunity is formulated specifically for children aged 1 to 12 years. For infants under 1 year, we recommend consulting your pediatrician before use.
Are there any artificial sweeteners in the syrup?
No, Yummunity uses natural fruit-based flavors and minimal raw honey for sweetness. It contains no artificial colors or synthetic sweeteners.
How long should I give this to my child?
For best results, we recommend a continuous course of 3 months, especially during seasonal transitions or when starting school.
